headline: AM Best Assigns Issue Credit Rating to Chubb INA Holdings LLC’s Senior Unsecured Notes
summary: OLDWICK, N.J., June 05, 2026--AM Best has assigned a Long-Term Issue Credit Rating of "a+" (Excellent) to Chubb INA Holdings LLC’s (Chubb) (Delaware) recently announced CAD 800 million issuance of senior unsecured notes in the Canadian market in two tranches, which are guaranteed by Chubb Limited: CAD 400 million issuance of 3.78% senior unsecured notes due 2031 and CAD 400 million issuance of 4.034% senior unsecured notes due 2033. The outlook assigned to these Credit Rating is stable.

The outlook assigned to these Credit Rating is stable.

headline: AFG's Investment Portfolio Provides Strong Earnings Tailwind
summary: American Financial benefits from a large investment portfolio, with rising yields and invested assets helping drive earnings growth.
